post.summary:
Get new token by refresh token
The grant_type parameter must be set to “refresh_token”.

code.description: Code from SMS OR Refresh Token

token_type.description: The type of token this is, typically just the string “bearer”

expires_in.description: If the access token expires, the server should reply with the duration of time the access token is granted for

silentMode.description: Return token. Not send sms. Only in test mode.

AuthRegistrationByPhoneModel.description: Model for registration by phone number.

PhoneAuthRegistrationByPhoneResultRespon.description: Result of registration by phone plus token info

AuthEmailConfirmationSendModel.description: Send Email with confirmation code model.

AuthEmailConfirmationResendModel.description: Resend Email with confirmation code model.

grant_type.description: The grant_type parameter must be set to “refresh_Token”.

refresh_token.description: The refresh token previously issued to the client.
